title: (Bearish Signal) TNA, enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Feb 23, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that TNA's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. A.I.dvisor backtested 77 similar cases where TNA's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 67 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $99.22 is above $39.19 the highest resistance line found by A.I. Throughout the month of 01/21/21 - 02/23/21, the price experienced a +12% Uptrend, while the week of 02/16/21 - 02/23/21 shows a -6% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/fso93iv9xgj61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=3fa20ea2410177f029dd6a4884e602abac2948b4

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for TNA moved out of overbought territory on February 16, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 44 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 37 of the 44 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 84%.

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. In 51 of 65 cases where TNA's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 78%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on February 23, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on TNA as a result. In 67 of 77 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 87%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for TNA turned negative on February 18, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 49 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 42 of the 49 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 86%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where TNA declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.
